name: loopgain
desc: An open-source cost controller for AI agent loops — stops a loop when it's actually converged and rolls back before it degrades, instead of running to a fixed …
descFull: An open-source cost controller for AI agent loops — stops a loop when it's actually converged and rolls back before it degrades, instead of running to a fixed max_iterations cap. Real-time loop-gain (Aβ) bands + best-so-far rollback. Adapters for LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, LangChain, OpenAI Agents, and Claude Agent SDK; raw API for custom stacks.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: LoopGain – Stop agent loops with control theory, not max_iterations
